segments.text: speak the things which become sound doctrine
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: That the aged men be sober, grave, temperate, sound in faith, in charity, in patience
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: The aged women likewise, that they be in behaviour as becometh holiness, not false accusers, not given to much wine, teachers of good things
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: That they may teach the young women to be sober, to love their husbands, to love their children
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: To be discreet, chaste, keepers at home, good, obedient to their own husbands, that the word of God be not blasphemed
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Young men likewise exhort to be sober minded
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: In all things shewing thyself a pattern of good works: in doctrine shewing uncorruptness, gravity, sincerity
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Sound speech, that cannot be condemned; that he that is of the contrary part may be ashamed, having no evil thing to say of you
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Exhort servants to be obedient unto their own masters, and to please them well in all things; not answering again
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Not purloining, but shewing all good fidelity; that they may adorn the doctrine of God our Saviour in all things
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men
Teaching us that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly, righteously, and godly, in this present world
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Looking for that blessed hope, and the glorious appearing of the great God and our Saviour Jesus Christ
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity, and purify unto himself a peculiar people, zealous of good works
segments.speaker: Jesus Christ

segments.text: These things speak, and exhort, and rebuke with all authority. Let no man despise thee
segments.speaker: Paul
